title: Datasource Configuration Field Pack
description: A field pack defines a reusable set of ConfigField definitions that plugins can compose into their dsconfig schema via baseFields.

id.description: Canonical pack identifier. Must match the FieldPackID constant in the companion .go file.

description.description: Human-readable description of the pack, including the source SDK and where the canonical field definitions are maintained in both Go and TypeScript.

fields.description: ConfigField definitions provided by this pack. Field IDs must be namespaced with the pack ID prefix, e.g. "plugin_sdk_settings.url".
